'''yotagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lycotropal|lycotropal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lycotropal|lycotropal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yotagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotagithi|yotagithi]] || [[word:yotagiji|yotagiji]] || [[word:yotagishi|yotagishi]] || [[word:yotagiki|yotagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotaguthuthu|yotaguthuthu]] || [[word:yotagujuju|yotagujuju]] || [[word:yotagushushu|yotagushushu]] || [[word:yotagukuku|yotagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotaguthu|yotaguthu]] || [[word:yotaguju|yotaguju]] || [[word:yotagushu|yotagushu]] || [[word:yotaguku|yotaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotagufthuf|yotagufthuf]] || [[word:yotagufjuf|yotagufjuf]] || [[word:yotagufshuf|yotagufshuf]] || [[word:yotagufkuf|yotagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotagethe|yotagethe]] || [[word:yotageje|yotageje]] || [[word:yotageshe|yotageshe]] || [[word:yotageke|yotageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotagothotho|yotagothotho]] || [[word:yotagojojo|yotagojojo]] || [[word:yotagoshosho|yotagoshosho]] || [[word:yotagokoko|yotagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotagotho|yotagotho]] || [[word:yotagojo|yotagojo]] || [[word:yotagosho|yotagosho]] || [[word:yotagoko|yotagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotagofthof|yotagofthof]] || [[word:yotagofjof|yotagofjof]] || [[word:yotagofshof|yotagofshof]] || [[word:yotagofkof|yotagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfthÃŸf|yotagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfjÃŸf|yotagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfshÃŸf|yotagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfkÃŸf|yotagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yotagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yotagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yotagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yotagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfthÃŸf|yotagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfjÃŸf|yotagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfshÃŸf|yotagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfkÃŸf|yotagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfthÃŸf|yotagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfjÃŸf|yotagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfshÃŸf|yotagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotagÃŸfkÃŸf|yotagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotagÃḊthÃḊ|yotagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yotagÃḊjÃḊ|yotagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yotagÃḊshÃḊ|yotagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yotagÃḊkÃḊ|yotagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotagathatha|yotagathatha]] || [[word:yotagajaja|yotagajaja]] || [[word:yotagashasha|yotagashasha]] || [[word:yotagakaka|yotagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotagatha|yotagatha]] || [[word:yotagaja|yotagaja]] || [[word:yotagasha|yotagasha]] || [[word:yotagaka|yotagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotagafthaf|yotagafthaf]] || [[word:yotagafjaf|yotagafjaf]] || [[word:yotagafshaf|yotagafshaf]] || [[word:yotagafkaf|yotagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yotagasha|yotagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yotagshÃḋsha|yotagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yotagrosha|yotagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yotagmusha|yotagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yotagyasha|yotagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyotagnkshÃḋsha|goyotagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyotagnkrosha|goyotagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyotagnkmusha|goyotagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyotagnkyasha|goyotagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yotatagasha|yotatagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yotatagshÃḋsha|yotatagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yotatagrosha|yotatagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yotatagmusha|yotatagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yotatagyasha|yotatagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyotatagnkshÃḋsha|goyotatagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyotatagnkrosha|goyotatagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyotatagnkmusha|goyotatagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyotatagnkyasha|goyotatagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yetÃḊgasha|yetÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yetÃḊgshÃḋsha|yetÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yetÃḊgrosha|yetÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yetÃḊgmusha|yetÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yetÃḊgyasha|yetÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyetÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|goyetÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyetÃḊgnkrosha|goyetÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyetÃḊgnkmusha|goyetÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyetÃḊgnkyasha|goyetÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yotfagasha|yotfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yotfagshÃḋsha|yotfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yotfagrosha|yotfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yotfagmusha|yotfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yotfagyasha|yotfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyotfagnkshÃḋsha|goyotfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyotfagnkrosha|goyotfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyotfagnkmusha|goyotfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyotfagnkyasha|goyotfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
